headline: VU Custom Acquires YR ID to Strengthen Leadership in End-to-End Product Customization Software
summary: NEW YORK, June 02, 2026--VU Custom, a leading end-to-end product customization software platform for consumer product brands, today announced it has acquired YR ID, a software platform powering online, retail, and live product customization experiences for global brands. The transaction brings together two complementary software businesses serving the rapidly growing demand for customization infrastructure across industries, sales channels, and production environments.
